title: Rule (GSM v1)
description: Behavioral logical atom: event-triggered program whose body is the single source of truth for imperative governance logic. First imperative level in the PPR chain.

body.description: Source code in the declared language, conforming to the SIE Rule API contract for that language binding. Must begin with an on('EventArchetypeName') call as its first executable statement.

language.description: Language binding for the Rule body. The Definition Manager dispatches to the language-specific parser for validation and auto-derivation.

x-sie-api.description: Language-neutral SIE Rule API contract that all language bindings implement.
